title: lithocarpus wrayi
intro: Lithocarpus wrayi, also known as the Wrayi's Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree belonging to the beech family, Fagaceae. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus wrayi have been utilized in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been found to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its potential health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels and improving cardiovascular health. Lithocarpus wrayi is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
